meaning: n.(虱等的)幼虫,卵,<英口>糊涂虫,傻瓜
examples: A lot of nit-picking was going on about irrelevant things.
Steven: NIT is buying Larkin's company?
I did a good job with the story about the merger of International Computer and NIT...
The team participated in the NIT tournament in 2010 and 2011, winning it all in 2011.
The building has its critics, ranging from nit-pickers to those with more serious misgivings.
